howItWorks.intro: This game server cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly Cost = (RAM x $4 + Cores x $8) x Hosting Multiplier x Location Multiplier
RAM Needed = Players x RAM-per-Player Factor
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much RAM does a game server need?
faq.answer: Minecraft: 1-2GB for 10 players, 4-8GB for 30+. FPS games: 2-4GB for most. Survival games (Rust, ARK): 8-16GB for 30+ players. More mods/plugins = more RAM needed.

faq.question: Should I use a managed host or VPS?
faq.answer: Managed hosts are easiest — one-click setup, auto-updates, game panel included. VPS is cheaper but requires Linux knowledge. Dedicated servers offer best performance for large communities (50+ regular players).

howWeCalculate.intro: This game server cost calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
